channel.title: ыцкпцкп on Public Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in ыцкпцкп on Public Notebook

item.title: A Grammar for Any Language
item.description: The case for such grammar So you want to learn new languages or maybe even teach them? I’ve seeking for some way to learn new stuff on my own a couple of times throughout my life, but up to some months ago it was being hard somehow. I had found “An Introduction to Descriptive Linguistics” by H. A. Gleason in an old-book store and begun to be more interested in the subject, particularly the concept of a abstract and formal reduction of language (and complex structures in general as well) to the pure and simple description of each of its parts.

item.title: Lorem
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Curabitur sodales sed metus non consectetur. In imperdiet lobortis scelerisque. Vivamus vel lacus dui. Praesent erat nibh, vestibulum vel vehicula et, varius a nibh. Phasellus et suscipit quam, eget vestibulum dolor. Proin eget pharetra sapien. Sed arcu justo, venenatis quis pellentesque sed, maximus quis nibh. Maecenas faucibus sapien eu magna lobortis, et lacinia sem viverra. Nam tristique bibendum velit, id commodo mauris tempor id.
